item.title: Teenage Nostalgia: The Princess Diaries
item.description: A mini review of The Princess Diaries and why its charmingly awkward moments still make it a comfort watch.

media:content.media:title: Teenage Nostalgia: The Princess Diaries
media:content.media:description: A mini review of The Princess Diaries and why its charmingly awkward moments still make it a comfort watch.

item.title: Unschooling has Taken Over TikTok
item.description: Exploring how unschooling content gained traction on TikTok and why the approach is sparking debate among parents.

media:content.media:title: Unschooling has Taken Over TikTok
media:content.media:description: Exploring how unschooling content gained traction on TikTok and why the approach is sparking debate among parents.

item.title: The Worst Show of Our Adolescence, "Popular"
item.description: Looking back at the TV series Popular and why it feels very different from how we remember it.

media:content.media:title: The Worst Show of Our Adolescence, "Popular"
media:content.media:description: Looking back at the TV series Popular and why it feels very different from how we remember it.

item.title: Reacting To Dr. Now
item.description: Breaking down Dr. Now’s funniest, bluntest, and absolutely savage one-liners. The man doesn’t sugarcoat anything and honestly… that’s why we love him.

media:content.media:title: Reacting To Dr. Now
media:content.media:description: Breaking down Dr. Now’s funniest, bluntest, and absolutely savage one-liners. The man doesn’t sugarcoat anything and honestly… that’s why we love him.
